## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Go to '...'
2. Upload '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected behaviour

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or backend log output to help explain your problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Browser | e.g. Edge 124, Chrome 124 |
| Deployment | Dev Container / Docker Compose / Azure Container Apps |
| .NET version | e.g. 10.0.x |

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
